name: Simple (Minimal)
description:
Semantic code search - finds code by concept.

BEST FOR: Finding functions/classes, exploring codebases

USE WHEN: Searching for functionality rather than exact text

QUERY TIPS:
- Use 1-3 words: "error handling", "auth", "database"
- Concepts work best: "authentication" not file paths
- Natural language questions need transformation:
  "How does auth work?" → "authentication"
  "What handles errors?" → "error handler"

EXAMPLES:
- "error handling"
- "database connection"
- "WebSocket disconnect"
- "cart validation"

AVOID:
- File paths: "src/auth.ts"
- Full sentences: "How do I handle errors?"
- Exact strings: "TODO", "FIXME"

SEARCH MODES:
- hybrid (default): Best overall
- fts: Exact keywords
- vector: Concepts

FILTERS: file_type, recency
notes: Minimal variant focusing on core essentials only - tests if brevity improves or hinders agent understanding
